objective: dogfood Campfire on itself and harden lifecycle verification coverage

The helper writes a valid execution policy into checkpoints.json
The helper is documented and validated

execution.notes: Milestone-005 validated. Keep moving through the queued backlog while the Codex App run budget remains.
